subject: [PATCH 11/13] mm: handle PMD swap entry faults on swap-in

2026-04-27.patch_summary: This patch adds a new function, do_huge_pmd_swap_page(), to handle PMD swap entry faults during swap-in operations. It resolves the entire 2 MB mapping in one shot by looking up the folio in the swap cache, allocating a PMD-order folio if necessary, and restoring soft_dirty and uffd_wp from the swap PMD. The patch also handles cases where PMD-order resources are unavailable, splitting the PMD swap entry into 512 PTE swap entries if necessary. Additionally, it updates vmf->orig_pmd and calls wp_huge_pmd() to COW immediately when a read-only PMD is faulted with a write operation.
